content: Apple rejects non-public/private API usage (e.g. MediaRemote). Detection is via static analysis of the binary: symbol/string scans (strings, otool, nm) find private selectors/symbols even when resolved via dlopen/dlsym, and private framework names in the binary. Guarding at runtime is insufficient if the symbols/strings are still linked/compiled in - must fully exclude the code from the shipped MAS binary (conditional compilation / separate target).
